description: Modulation → filter.cutoff. A stepped bipolar LFO (1-bar loop) sweeps the cutoff on a steady broadband hat; the spectral centroid (brightness) must sweep across the render. Proves the filter-cutoff modulation path (proportion-space skew + write-back). Baseline (no Asgn) centroid range is ~265 Hz; modulated is ~8500 Hz — threshold 3000 Hz sits well clear of both.

assertions.name: audio_present
assertions.comment: the hat must be sounding so the filter has broadband content to sweep

assertions.name: cutoff_sweeps_brightness
assertions.comment: modulated cutoff sweep moves the centroid >3 kHz; un-modulated baseline is ~265 Hz
